merchantAccount.description: The merchant account that is used to process the payment.

paymentReference.description: The [`reference`](https://docs.adyen.com/api-explorer/#/CheckoutService/latest/post/payments__reqParam_reference) of the payment to cancel.

pspReference.description: Adyen's 16-character reference associated with the cancel request.

reference.description: Your reference for the cancel request.

status.description: The status of your request. This will always have the value **received**.
